zh.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾
zh.Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素
zh.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell於0954年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素。她於大約0973年與Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1028年在英國威爾斯享年74歲，埋葬在法國皮卡迪索姆。

zh-hans.Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell于0954年出生在威尔士蒙格莫利夏爾卡素。她于大约0973年与Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent在英国威尔斯蒙格莫利夏爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1028年在英国威尔斯享年74岁，埋葬在法国皮卡迪索姆。

nameMeanings.name: Nesta
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of Nest, a Welsh pet form of Agnes ; the name of the grandmother of the 12th-century chronicler Giraldus Cambrensis (‘Gerald the Welshman’).

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: From the vocabulary word denoting the plant (Old English fearn). Modern use of this word as a given name dates from the 19th century, when it is also recorded occasionally as a boy's name in the United States. In some instances the given name may be a transferred use of the surname derived in the medieval period from the vocabulary word.

en.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell was born in 0954, in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales. She married Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent about 0973, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 9 daughters. She died in 1028, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 74, and was buried in Somme, Picardie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell est née en 0954, à Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Elle a épousé Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent environ 0973, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée en 1028, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Somme, Picardie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell wurde 0954 in Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren. Sie hat um 0973 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb 1028 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich begraben.

ht.Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom: Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell è nata il nel 0954 nel Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles. Lei sposato Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent circa 0973, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 9 figlie. Morì nel 1028, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Somme, Picardie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadellは0954年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアカストルで生まれた。約0973年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでGwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwentと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1028年にイギリスウェールズで74歳で死去し，フランスピカーディソンメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell(은)는 0954년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 카스틀에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 0973년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1028년 영국 웨일스에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 피카디 솜에 묻혔다.

pt.0978: de 6 de janeiro de 0978 a 5 de janeiro de 0979
pt.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell nasceu em 0954, em Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Ela casou-se com Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent aproximadamente 0973, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1028, em Gales, United Kingdom, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Somme, Picardie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell родилась в 0954 г. в местности кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent около 0973 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1028 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Nesta ferch Cadell nació en 0954, en Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales. Se casó con Gwerystan ap Gwaithfoed Lord of Cibwyr in Gwent aproximadamente 0973, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió en 1028, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Somme, Picardie, Francia.
